game_name: Super Street Fighter II: The New Challengers

special_mechanics.name: Special Techniques
special_mechanics.description: Character-specific special moves refined from previous versions. Examples: Ryu's Fire Hadōken (Shakunetsu Hadōken), Ken's flaming Shoryuken, Zangief's Atomic Buster, M. Bison's Devil Reverse

tier_notes: Tier 2 data: Wikipedia source provides game information but contains no specific physics parameters, sub-pixel system data, or movement mechanics. This is a fighting game, which typically does not document detailed movement physics like platformers. Game speed was noted as reduced to Champion Edition levels compared to Hyper Fighting, but no quantitative values provided.
